next_steps: Open https://wallabag.hdc.dukk.org (or http://<ct-ip>:80) and create the first admin account in the web UI.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/wallabag-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
BIND CNAME wallabag → nginx-waf-a and nginx-waf site upstream http://<ct-ip>:80 (internal-lan).
Keep HDC_WALLABAG_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing it makes the MariaDB volume unrecoverable.
